positive: A minimalist celestial landscape featuring a majestic crescent moon and a cluster of stylized constellations forming an abstract animal silhouette, like a soaring eagle or leaping fox. The background is a deep, velvety indigo gradient transitioning to cosmic violet. Use clean linework, highly contrasting bioluminescent gold and silver accents for the stars and moon. The composition should be perfectly centered, allowing for a strong, easily recognizable negative space. Style: Neo-geometric and ethereal, perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. Lighting: Dramatic, emanating solely from the celestial objects themselves. Print details: Vector-art quality, scalable, high contrast, perfect for repeat or single placement.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, artist, blur, noise, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, messy, dirty, grainy, gradient texture, photorealistic, photographic, clutter
